Module com.cuatrifasico.battleshi

Class PlacementController.Selection

java.lang.Object
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.Selection
Enclosing class:
PlacementController
private static final class PlacementController.Selection extends Object
Immutable-enough record of what is currently "in hand" while placing.
